india_trends.title: Bitcoin at $77K after touching $79K on record nine-day inflows of $2.12 billion. Here is what experts say
india_trends.summary: Bitcoin is trading near the $77,000 to $79,000 mark. Nine consecutive days of strong inflows totaling over $2.1 billion show renewed institutional confidence. Easing geopolitical tensions also boost investor sentiment. Analysts suggest this could be Bitcoin's best April since 2020 if momentum contin

india_trends.title: Multibagger stock Transformers and Rectifiers zooms over 10% after receipt of ₹150 crore order
india_trends.summary: Transformers and Rectifiers shares rose over 10% following a $16.25 million export order win. The company reported a dip in profits but plans significant capital expenditure to increase capacity. Its current order book stands at ₹5,005 crore, reflecting strong international demand.

india_trends.title: Acko lines up ICICI Sec, Kotak, Morgan Stanley for $2 billion IPO
india_trends.summary: Bengaluru-based insurtech Acko has appointed ICICI Securities, Kotak Mahindra Capital and Morgan Stanley for an IPO that could value it at up to $2 billion.

india_trends.title: Coal India Q4 Results 2026 LIVE: Coal India share price falls ahead of earnings today. What to expect?
india_trends.summary: Coal India Q4 Results 2026 LIVE: Coal India is expected to report a fall in its net profit and revenue, driven by lower coal offtake. The company’s coal offtake in Q4FY26 is estimated to decline by 0.8% to 199 MT from 201 MT in the year-ago period. Sequentially, offtake is seen growing by 6%.

india_trends.title: IDBI Bank sets board meeting for Q4 results 2026. Details here
india_trends.summary: IDBI Bank said on Monday, 27 April, that will board of directors will meet on Thursday, 30 April to announce financial results for the quarter ending on March 31, 2026.

india_trends.title: Suzlon Energy shares jump 4%, extend gains for second session. Should you buy this renewable energy player?
india_trends.summary: Suzlon Energy shares are soaring, driven by strong market sentiment and rising electricity demand forecasts. Analysts are bullish, citing robust March quarter expectations and the company's leadership in India's wind sector. Improved financials and increasing institutional investor interest further

india_trends.title: Mapping the fallout: Which Indian sectors face risks from the West Asia war?
india_trends.summary: The West Asia war has triggered an energy crisis, hitting sectors like fertilizers and airlines. With the Strait of Hormuz disrupted, rising costs and supply shortages could directly or indirectly impact nearly 30 sectors.

india_trends.title: AI boom drowns out war fears to fuel Asia’s great market divide
india_trends.summary: Asia's markets are split: South and Southeast Asia grapple with rising oil prices impacting trade and stocks, while North Asia's tech giants, fueled by AI enthusiasm, hit record highs. This divergence highlights investors favoring future growth industries over immediate geopolitical energy risks. Th

india_trends.title: Rise, fall, repeat: Why Indian stock market volatility may persist and a sustained rally may remain elusive
india_trends.summary: The Indian stock market experiences wild fluctuations driven by global cues, crude oil prices, and geopolitical tensions. Despite short-term gains, persistent uncertainties suggest a challenging outlook ahead.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: Amid a rights issue offer, penny stock doubles shareholders' money in one month. Check details
india_trends.summary: Gujarat Cotex's share price has surged over 100% in a month following a rights issue announcement to raise ₹42.73 crore for expansion. The issue offers shares at ₹5, significantly below the market price, and will close on May 8, 2026.

india_trends.title: India–New Zealand to sign FTA to boost trade, investments and market access across goods and services
india_trends.summary: India and New Zealand are set to sign a Free Trade Agreement. This pact will boost bilateral trade in goods and services. It will also encourage mutual investments. India gains duty-free access for all exports. New Zealand gets duty-free access for over 54% of its exports. The agreement deepens econ

india_trends.title: Crude oil prices rise 2.5% on US-Iran peace talks uncertainty; Goldman Sachs raises Brent Q4 forecast to $90
india_trends.summary: Crude oil prices surged nearly 2.5% on Monday as the peace talks between the US and Iran stalled, and the Strait of Hormuz remained effectively shut. Meanwhile, Goldman Sachs has raised its target for Brent and WTI crude for the fourth quarter.

india_trends.title: Hindustan Zinc shares surge 5% as Q4 profit jumps 68% YoY; co announces interim dividend
india_trends.summary: Shares of Hindustan Zinc surged nearly 5% on Monday after the company posted a strong Q4 FY26 performance, with profit soaring 68% YoY and revenue rising 49%. Record metal production, industry-leading EBITDA margins, and the announcement of an interim dividend further lifted investor sentiment.

india_trends.title: Shriram Finance shares fall nearly 5% despite strong Q4 profit growth
india_trends.summary: The share price decline despite a sharp rise in fourth quarter earnings highlights investor concerns around asset quality and margin trends

india_trends.title: Robotic joint replacement surgery and insurance: The gap patients should know about
india_trends.summary: Robotic surgery offers better outcomes for knee pain patients. However, many Indians cannot access this advanced treatment due to insurance limitations. Insurers should update policies to cover robotic procedures equally with traditional ones. This will improve patient recovery and reduce long-term

india_trends.title: Eveready Industries’ Rs 200-crore manufacturing plant to pave the way for global play
india_trends.summary: Eveready Industries has launched a new Rs 200 crore manufacturing plant in Jammu. This facility is India's only operating alkaline battery plant. It will significantly increase production capacity. The plant aims to meet growing demand for high-performance power solutions. It will also reduce India'

india_trends.title: India Cements shares soar 10% as Q4 net profit rockets 300%, revenue up 3%. Check details
india_trends.summary: India Cements shares surged after Q4 net profit jumped 300% YoY to Rs 60 crore, driven by a sharp rise in EBITDA, even as revenue growth remained modest at 3%.
